items.name_en: This 30 Montaigne Avenue handbag is exquisite and elegant, further enriching the classic design. Crafted from black patent calfskin, the rounded flap features a refined curve and is accented with a vintage gold-finish metal CD turnlock, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo and features the classic chain strap alternating between gold-finish metal and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. Small size, with a pleated design and a refined silhouette, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.

Dimensions: 18 x 10 x 4.5

items.name_en: New Lady Dior 🌟 Lambskin Series
items.name_cn:
New Lady Dior 🌟 Lambskin Series
This Lady D-Joy handbag interprets Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. An elegant and classic style, crafted from nude pink lambskin, accented with light gold-finished metal 'D.I.O.R.' charm to elevate the look, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a removable chain strap and an adjustable, removable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.
Size 22cm
9240

items.name_en: M83689 Rabbit🐰! From the collaboration series between Louis Vuitton Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière and Chinese artist Sun Yitian, known for depicting mass-produced items with vibrant brushstrokes. The Zippy Large Wallet has a capacity comparable to a small bag. It features a smartphone pocket and can hold keys, a passport, credit cards, and cash. Easily stores personal essentials, the perfect travel companion. Dimensions 19Cmx10cm.
